boundary: Fold0 diagnostic only. Train source is deterministic-oracle evidence-rationale target text, not live runner behavior. Raw run outputs remain ignored under post_training/runs/.
interpretation: The model fits the 400-row generative-rationale training artifact by loss.
Held-out generative-rationale strict generation remains weak at 0.300 action accuracy, despite parse-stable outputs.
Unprompted native/base prompt transfer fails as strict JSON decision generation, with 10/10 parse failures.
Constrained candidate scoring on the native/base prompt reaches 0.400, recovering ground and verify only.
This is a negative fold0 diagnostic for generative-rationale SFT as an internalization route. The deployable evidence-rationale guardrail remains the strongest current path.
next_safe_action: Do not scale this exact generative-rationale SFT formulation before changing the objective. Prefer contrastive/preference training around boundary decisions or keep the evidence-rationale layer as an external guardrail/routing component.
